title: Quote Risk Analyzer
description: Industrial-grade risk assessment tool for manufacturing and logistics quoting, based on ISO 31000, Lean Six Sigma, and WERC standards.

inputs.label: Order Volume (units)
inputs.businessContext: Total quantity of items in the quote. Higher volumes may reduce unit cost but increase risk exposure.

inputs.label: Unit Price ($)
inputs.businessContext: Price per unit quoted to the customer.

inputs.label: Production Lead Time (days)
inputs.businessContext: Time from order placement to delivery. Longer lead times increase demand forecast risk.

inputs.label: Material Cost Variability (%)
inputs.businessContext: Expected fluctuation in raw material costs during the lead time. Based on historical volatility.

inputs.label: Labor Skill Level
inputs.businessContext: Skill level of the workforce assigned to the project. Low skill increases defect risk.

inputs.label: Historical Defect Rate (%)
inputs.businessContext: Historical percentage of defective units from similar production runs. Used for Six Sigma DPMO calculation.

inputs.label: Logistics Complexity Score
inputs.businessContext: Score based on number of shipping modes, customs requirements, and distance. Higher score increases risk.

inputs.label: Customer Credit Rating
inputs.businessContext: Standard credit rating of the customer. Lower ratings increase payment default risk.

inputs.label: Contract Penalty Clause
inputs.businessContext: Whether the contract includes penalty clauses for late delivery or non-conformance.

rules.message: High volume and long lead time: consider phased delivery to reduce risk.
High defect rate combined with low skill level: mandatory training or rework plan required.
High-risk customer with penalty clause: consider requiring prepayment or insurance.

thresholds.message: Cost risk index indicates potential margin erosion.

formulas.name: Defect Risk Cost
formulas.description: Expected cost due to defects, including rework and scrap, based on Six Sigma principles.
formulas.notes: 1.5 multiplier accounts for hidden rework and inspection costs per ISO 9001.

formulas.name: Lead Time Risk Factor
formulas.description: Risk multiplier based on lead time and logistics complexity.

formulas.name: Material Cost Risk
formulas.description: Potential additional cost from material price volatility.
formulas.notes: Assumes 40% of revenue is material cost (typical for manufacturing).

formulas.name: Credit Risk Factor
formulas.description: Risk factor based on customer credit rating.
formulas.formula: CASE customer_credit_rating WHEN 'AAA' THEN 0.01 WHEN 'AA' THEN 0.02 WHEN 'A' THEN 0.03 WHEN 'BBB' THEN 0.05 WHEN 'BB' THEN 0.10 WHEN 'B' THEN 0.15 WHEN 'CCC' THEN 0.25 WHEN 'D' THEN 0.50 ELSE 0.05 END

formulas.name: Penalty Risk
formulas.description: Additional risk if penalty clause exists.
formulas.notes: 5% of revenue as typical penalty exposure.

formulas.name: Overall Risk Score
formulas.description: Primary risk score (0-100) combining all risk factors, normalized.

primary.label: Overall Risk Score
primary.description: Aggregate risk score for the quote. Higher values indicate greater risk.

cost_risk_index.label: Cost Risk Index
cost_risk_index.description: Ratio of total risk cost to base revenue.

lead_time_risk_factor.label: Lead Time Risk Factor
lead_time_risk_factor.description: Multiplier for lead time and logistics complexity.

hiddenLossDrivers.label: Hidden Rework Cost
hiddenLossDrivers.description: Unplanned rework due to defects not captured in standard defect rate (Lean Muda).

hiddenLossDrivers.label: Expediting Shipping Cost
hiddenLossDrivers.description: Cost of air freight or expedited shipping to meet deadlines (WERC logistics risk).

hiddenLossDrivers.label: Inventory Holding Cost
hiddenLossDrivers.description: Cost of carrying extra safety stock due to lead time variability.

suggestedActions.label: Reduce Lead Time
suggestedActions.description: Negotiate shorter lead time or use lean production methods to lower risk.

suggestedActions.label: Improve Quality Control
suggestedActions.description: Implement Six Sigma DMAIC to reduce defect rate below 2%.

suggestedActions.label: Hedge Material Costs
suggestedActions.description: Use fixed-price contracts or futures to mitigate material cost variability.

suggestedActions.label: Enhanced Credit Check
suggestedActions.description: Request advance payment or credit insurance for low-rated customers.

suggestedActions.label: Negotiate Penalty Waiver
suggestedActions.description: Attempt to remove or cap penalty clauses in the contract.

dataConfidenceAdjusted.label: Data Confidence Adjusted Risk Score
dataConfidenceAdjusted.description: Risk score adjusted for data quality and completeness (e.g., if inputs are estimated, score is inflated by 10%).
